Property.interested_sub: Leave an inquiry and I will contact you shortly.

pirkimas.title: From search to closing
pirkimas.description: My goal as your representative is to align your needs with market opportunities, identify risks, and ensure maximum favorable terms.
pirkimas.step1_desc: We meet to clarify your expectations, capabilities, and key criteria to start a targeted search.
pirkimas.step2_desc: Selected properties on the market are presented systematically. I highlight pros and cons during viewings.
pirkimas.step3_desc: I ensure professional negotiations, legally evaluate contracts, and prepare documents for a secure notary closing.
pirkimas.value1: Save time by viewing only properties matching your expectations.
pirkimas.value2: Identified hidden defects or legal risks in properties.
pirkimas.value3: Guaranteed most favorable purchase conditions in negotiations.

pardavimas.title: Clear strategy, strong
pardavimas.description: Not just a listing on portals, but a professionally managed sales system. Higher interest and maximum favorable deal conditions.
pardavimas.strategy_desc: Marketing efficiency is boosted by targeted tools and legal negotiation skills.
pardavimas.feat1_desc: Professional lighting, drone shots, 3D tours, and floor plans. Your property makes a luxury impression from the first click.
pardavimas.feat2_desc: I analyze not just listings, but real Registry Center deals in your neighborhood. No guessing.
pardavimas.feat3_desc: Document checks, lien searches, inheritance nuances. I handle everything until the final notary signature.
pardavimas.feat4_desc: Targeted ads on social networks (FB, IG) and Google Ads. Your property is seen only by those interested in RE right now.

nuoma.title: Long-term Rent
nuoma.description: Reliable tenant screening and professional contract administration. Your investment yields returns constantly and securely.

services.step1_desc: Based on income, solvency, and reference analysis. Only tenants matching your standards are selected.
services.step2_desc: Clear and detailed rental agreements protecting the owner from damage, late payments, or unexpected events.
services.step3_desc: Control of acceptance-handover acts, defect registration, and smooth moving-in and moving-out processes.

nuoma.guarantee_desc: Handing over an apartment to tenants shouldn't mean constant stress. My system relies on maximum security:
nuoma.guarantee1: Comprehensive property marketing for target groups
nuoma.guarantee2: Risk factor assessment before signing the contract

atsiliepimai.title: Trust creates
atsiliepimai.description: I am glad for every success story and appreciate every review. It is my motivation to move forward.
atsiliepimai.no_reviews_sub: Be the first to leave a review!
atsiliepimai.success_desc: Your review has been sent for moderation and will appear on the site soon.

duk.title: Frequently Asked
duk.description: Answers to the most important questions, helping you make the right decisions on your real estate journey.
duk.cta_title: Didn't find an answer to your question?
duk.cta_desc: Get in touch and let's discuss your situation individually.

kontaktai.title: Contact Us
kontaktai.description: Ready to sell or invest? Contact me and let's discuss your expectations and my strategy.
kontaktai.form_placeholder_message: Describe your situation or ask a question...
kontaktai.form_privacy: By clicking "Send Message" you agree to the privacy policy.
kontaktai.success_desc: Thank you for reaching out. I will answer you as soon as possible.
